revision.comment: Add option to override link text & use style instead of template
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Hatnote||extraclasses=relarticle mainarticle selfreference noprint|1={{#if:{{{table|}}}| This table | {{#ifeq:{{Yesno-no|{{{part|}}}}}|yes|Part of this section|This section}} }} is [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from [[{{{1|{{{source|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{1|{{{source|}}}}}}}}}]]. ([{{fullurl:{{Absolute page title|{{{1|{{{source|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} edit] | [{{fullurl:{{Absolute page title|{{{1|{{{source|}}}}}}}}|action=history}} history])}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#invoke:Hatnote||extraclasses=relarticle mainarticle selfreference noprint|1={{#if:{{{table|}}}| This table | {{#ifeq:{{Yesno-no|{{{part|}}}}}|yes|Part of this section|This section}} }} is [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from [[{{{1|{{{source|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{1|{{{source|}}}}}}}}}]]. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
